expectations.evidence: report.html exists with Korean-language quality audit report.
report.csv exists with 70 rows covering all accessibility, SEO, and WP items.
CSV and HTML contain accessibility section with A-01 through A-33 plus SH-01 to SH-07.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO and Web Performance section (Section B)

expectations.evidence: CSV contains SEO-01 through SEO-11 with results. Many are ➖ N/A since only dashboard.tsx was reviewed.

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references

expectations.text: Accessibility findings include specific KWCAG item IDs and line references
expectations.evidence: Accessibility findings map to specific KWCAG items (A-17, A-23, A-32, A-33) with line references like 'dashboard.tsx:29-31,34-36' and 'dashboard.tsx:45-47'.

expectations.text: Performance findings include code-level analysis (layout thrashing, lazy loading, etc.)
expectations.evidence: WP-09: 'dashboard.tsx:12-13 — offsetHeight 읽기 직후 style.minHeight 쓰기. 강제 리플로우 발생'. WP-05: 'dashboard.tsx:50 — below-fold 이미지에 loading=lazy 미지정'. WP-18: 'dashboard.tsx:17-19 — setTimeout 500ms 후 items 동적 삽입. 공간 미예약으로 CLS 발생'.
